reference: GURR SALUTED AND STATED HIS BUSINESS WHILE THE BARONET WHO HAD TURNED SALLOWER AND MORE CAREWORN THAN HIS LOT DREW A BREATH FULL OF RELIEF ONE OF YOUR SHIP BOYS HE SAID
text: gur saluted and stated his business while the baronet who had turned sallower and more careworn than his lot drew a breath full of relief one of your ship-boys he said
